# libhangul galmadeuli golden v1 kbd=2noshift (do not edit by hand)
## new_ok=1
## singles
T s_21
  k=0x21 p=0 commit=(empty) pre=(empty)
  flush=(empty)

## replace_fire
T kka
  k=0x72 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3131
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC00
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AE4C
  flush=U+AE4C
T tteo
  k=0x65 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3137
  k=0x6A p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+B354
  k=0x6A p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+B5A0
  flush=U+B5A0
T ppa

  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+BC14
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+BE60
  flush=U+BE60

  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+C2F8
  flush=U+C2F8

  k=0x6A p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+C800
  k=0x6A p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+CA4C
  flush=U+CA4C

  flush=U+AE68
## replace_nofire
T ka_keo

  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AC00
  k=0x6A p=1 commit=U+AC00 pre=U+3153
  flush=U+3153
T aa_nocho
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+314F
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=U+314F pre=U+314F
  flush=U+314F

  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AE4C

## cluster
T salm

  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+C0AC
  k=0x66 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+C0B4
  k=0x61 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+C0B6
  flush=U+C0B6
T dak_a
  k=0x65 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3137
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+B2E4
  k=0x72 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+B2E5
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=U+B2E4 pre=U+AC00
  flush=U+AC00
T anj
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+314F
  k=0x73 p=1 commit=U+314F pre=U+3134
  k=0x77 p=1 commit=U+3134 pre=U+3148
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+C790
  flush=U+C790
## words
T hangul
  k=0x67 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+314E
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+D558
  k=0x73 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+D55C
  k=0x72 p=1 commit=U+D55C pre=U+3131
  k=0x6D p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+ADF8
  k=0x66 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AE00
  flush=U+AE00

  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+B098
  k=0x66 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+B0A0
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=U+B098 pre=U+B77C
  flush=U+B77C

  k=0x31 p=0 commit=(empty) pre=(empty)
  k=0x32 p=0 commit=(empty) pre=(empty)

  flush=(empty)

## vowels
T gwa
  k=0x72 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3131
  k=0x68 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+ACE0
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+ACFC
  flush=U+ACFC
T gwo
  k=0x72 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3131
  k=0x6E p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AD6C
  k=0x6A p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AD88
  flush=U+AD88
T yae
  k=0x72 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3131
  k=0x6D p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+ADF8
  k=0x6C p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+AE14
  flush=U+AE14
## backspace
T bs_kka
  built pre=U+AE4C
  bs r=1 pre=U+314F
  bs r=1 pre=(empty)
T bs_salm
  built pre=U+C0B6
  bs r=1 pre=U+C0B4
  bs r=1 pre=U+C0AC
  bs r=1 pre=U+3145
  bs r=1 pre=(empty)
T bs_gwa
  built pre=U+ACFC
  bs r=1 pre=U+ACE0
  bs r=1 pre=U+3131
  bs r=1 pre=(empty)
## reset
T rs_1
  afterreset pre=(empty) empty=1
  flush=U+B098
T rs_2
  afterreset pre=(empty) empty=1
  flush=U+B354
# end
